CodeSystems SHOULD have a stated value for the caseSensitive element so that users know the status and meaning of the code system clearly
Code systems published by HL7 SHALL conform to the ShareableCodeSystem profile, which says that the element CodeSystem.experimental is mandatory, but it is not present
Code systems published by HL7 SHALL conform to the ShareableCodeSystem profile, which says that the element CodeSystem.caseSensitive is mandatory, but it is not present

Wrong Display Name 'Gjennomført' for http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/medication-admin-status#completed. Valid display is 'Completed' (for the language(s) 'en, en-US'). Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code

Wrong Display Name 'Feilregistrert' for http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/medication-admin-status#entered-in-error. Valid display is 'Entered in Error' (for the language(s) 'en, en-US'). Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code
